name: IronCondorStrategy
description: Neutral options strategy that profits from low volatility. Sells an OTM call spread and OTM put spread simultaneously to collect premium. Exits via a four-tier data-driven profit-take (40% of position at 20% profit, 30% at 40% profit, 20% at 60% profit, final 10% at 80% profit) or a 21 DTE time stop, whichever comes first.

tier1Profit.description: Profit fraction to close 40% of position

tier2Profit.description: Profit fraction to close 30% of position

tier3Profit.description: Profit fraction to close 20% of position

tier4Profit.description: Profit fraction to close the final 10% of position

tier1Fraction.description: Position fraction closed at tier 1 (20% profit)

tier2Fraction.description: Position fraction closed at tier 2 (40% profit)

tier3Fraction.description: Position fraction closed at tier 3 (60% profit)

tier4Fraction.description: Position fraction closed at tier 4 (80% profit)

exitDte.description: Close all remaining position at or below this DTE
